title: The Kova
text: A website I made for a restaurant in New York City. I took all the photos on the website and added  menu, location, and contact sections.

title: Fresh Mangoes
text: A movies and TV review website based off of Rotten Tomatoes. Built in Java, React, MySQL, HTML, and CSS.

title: Elderly
text: Videochat designed and created for the elderly. Coded in Node.js, Express, HTML, and CSS.

title: Twitter Clone
text: A replica of twitter in functionality. Coded in  Node.js, Express, Angular, MongoDB, HTML, and CSS.

title: Airpedia
text: An airline ticket booking website inspired by Expedia. Created in Java, MySQL, JSP, HTML, and CSS.

title: Charitable Chores
text: A mobile app that incentivizes people to do nice things for others at little to no costs. Built in PHP, MySQL, HTML, and CSS.

title: Pokemon Bot
text: Artificial intelligence bot that challenges players on pokemonshowdown.com in real time. Built with Java and Selenium.

title: Scenic Music
text: A music recommendation service that determines the perfect playlist based on the user's location. Coded in JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.
